name: jsnes
purpose: Headless NES emulator used only by local reference-frame capture tooling (scripts/capture-smb-reference-frames.mjs) to render a user-supplied ROM into ignored-cache reference frames for pixel-frame verification. Never shipped in the browser bundle or runtime.
licenseEvidence: npm registry metadata for jsnes@2.1.0 reported license `Apache-2.0` and repository `git://github.com/bfirsh/jsnes.git`.
wellKnownEvidence: jsnes is a long-established pure-JavaScript NES emulator (github.com/bfirsh/jsnes) with zero runtime dependencies, widely used for browser and headless NES emulation.
